articles.description: BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty asks what Spurs should do next with uncertainty surrounding the future of interim head coach Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Stick with Tudor or go for De Zerbi, Mason, Redknapp or another - where do Spurs go next?

articles.description: We all love to watch the players with the flicks and tricks, the mavericks with the magic manoeuvres. Here, BBC Sport ranks football's top showboaters.
articles.title: Football's greatest showboaters ranked: Ronaldinho, Neymar, Balotelli, Kerlon

articles.description: Tom English speaks to those who returned Scotland to the men's World Cup finals  for the first time since 1998 about the epic win over Denmark.
articles.title: Fifa World Cup: The night Scotland beat Denmark - told by those who made it happen

articles.description: PSG ask for their top-of-the-table Ligue 1 match against Lens to be postponed in order to help them for their Champions League quarter-final against Liverpool.
articles.title: PSG request to move match before Liverpool Champions League tie

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions before the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Verstappen and Red Bull, Newey and Aston Martin, Audi, Cadillac and F1's sustainable fuel

articles.description: The World Snooker Championship will remain at the Crucible in Sheffield until 2045, with the venue set to be refurbished to add up to 500 additional seats.
articles.title: Revamped Crucible to host World Championship until 2045

articles.description: Former France forward Antoine Griezmann will join MLS side Orlando City from Atletico Madrid this summer.
articles.title: Antoine Griezmann: Atletico Madrid legend to join MLS side Orlando City

articles.description: As Wales look to secure qualification for the World Cup, Neco Williams describes how following in the footsteps of Welsh icons can be an inspiration and a burden.
articles.title: Neco Williams on Wales icons and World Cup qualification

articles.description: Ben Duckett withdraws from the forthcoming Indian Premier League (IPL) in an attempt to hold on to his place in the England team.
articles.title: Ben Duckett: Opening batter withdraws from IPL in attempt to keep England place

articles.description: The Premier League is on a break for almost three weeks as international football takes centre stage, but will it give your club a chance to reset or disrupt momentum?
articles.title: Premier League: Is the international break good for your side?
